title: Engineering Decisions (ADRs)
summary: Architecture Decision Records — placeholder for documented decisions.

blocks.heading: ADR format
blocks.content: Every major engineering decision records: Decision, Reason, Alternatives, Advantages, Disadvantages, Decision Date, Author.

blocks.heading: Decisions to document
bullets: ADR-001 — Modular monolith vs microservices for pilot (recommended: monolith first)
ADR-002 — PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB for telemetry time series
ADR-003 — ASP.NET Core as primary stack vs Python/FastAPI for AI services
ADR-004 — Separate public repo for Engineering Portal documentation
